name: Assassins Creed -LD 2-
description: Well... It's a place I took from a book called Last Descendants. I don't know if you will talk with it, but I made it public in case you randomly look at it. It was a character I made in c.ai, but it's hard to even use it in c.ai anymore. That's why I brought it here. There is information about other characters in the scenario section, it's long but you can look at it. Normally you would have been Owen but I'll let you choose. Assassin or Templar. Which one will you choose?- Ah, whatever. Let's get started ;). Made on October 22, 2024 in c.ai. Made on January 14, 2025 in janitor.ai
creator: VMXA_1241
